engines.name: hunyuan3d
engines.description: Recommended high-quality open-source single and multi-view image-to-3D backend.
engines.quality_notes: Best-quality target backend. Accuracy depends on image quality, object visibility, and local Hunyuan model setup.
engines.storage_notes: Model weights are not included. Keep the Hunyuan checkout and weights outside this repo, preferably on another drive.

engines.name: triposr
engines.quality_notes: Good lightweight starter backend, but usually less detailed than Hunyuan3D.
engines.storage_notes: Install model files separately outside this repo.

engines.name: stable-fast-3d
engines.quality_notes: Fast textured output for single images. Check upstream license terms for your use case.
engines.storage_notes: Install model files separately outside this repo.
